articles.summary: Exxon Mobil moved ahead with approval steps for a new offshore development phase in Guyana’s Stabroek block, targeting up to 35 additional wells. The company signed a preliminary agreement to supply LNG to a planned power project in South Africa. Exxon Mobil is also exploring LNG expansion paths in Asia-Pacific, including a potential transaction with Woodside Energy.
